summary: Backend testing of enhanced photo tagging flow with session participant pricing and NEW badge tracking. All 13 tests passed covering PhotoTag creation, is_new field, mark-photo-viewed, and analytics events.
critical_code_review_comments: PhotoTag model is properly created via POST /api/ai/confirm-tags
is_new field correctly returned by GET /api/ai/my-tagged-photos and GET /api/profile/{id}/tagged
POST /api/ai/mark-photo-viewed properly sets viewed_at and clears NEW badge
AnalyticsEvent created for both photo_tagged and photo_viewed events
access_granted field in response reflects session participant + $0 price logic
Notification messages correctly differentiate access_granted status
seed_data_creation: Created test gallery items with PhotoTag records via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo tagging with session participant pricing is fully functional. Key endpoints tested: 1) POST /api/ai/confirm-tags creates PhotoTag with was_session_participant and access_granted fields 2) GET /api/ai/my-tagged-photos returns is_new, tag_id, access_granted, session_photo_price 3) GET /api/profile/{id}/tagged returns ai_tagged items with is_new field 4) POST /api/ai/mark-photo-viewed clears NEW badge and creates photo_viewed analytics event. All tests currently show was_session_participant=false because test users are not LiveSessionParticipants - to test the $0 price auto-grant logic, create a LiveSessionParticipant record first.

backend: POST /api/ai/confirm-tags - Creates PhotoTag records with was_participant and access_granted
GET /api/ai/my-tagged-photos - Returns tagged_photos with is_new, tag_id, session_photo_price fields
GET /api/profile/{id}/tagged - Returns items with is_new field and new_count
POST /api/ai/mark-photo-viewed - Clears NEW badge by setting viewed_at, creates AnalyticsEvent
GET /api/notifications/{user_id} - Returns photo_tagged notifications with access_granted in data
AnalyticsEvent creation for photo_tagged and photo_viewed events verified
